g.text: The five primitives — one glyph + one semantic color each
no start, no progress, no fix
a real run, start -> waiting-on-LLM -> success + next action:
… asking the model which prompts need changes
… asking the model which prompts need changes (waiting on LLM)
review the changes below, then run `pdd change` on each
Actionable failure — what failed + why + what to try
check the path to the change file
run `pdd detect --help` for the expected arguments
… comparing the two prompts for conflicts
… comparing the two prompts for conflicts (waiting on LLM)
review the conflicts below and reconcile the prompts
